title: 2025 Begins with Uncertainty
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
The year 2025 commenced with uncertainty surrounding both the dry bulk and tanker sectors. Global geopolitical tensions continue to drive market volatility, shaping current sentiment. Additionally, potential new tariffs and sanctions that may be implemented by the newly elected President of the United States could further disrupt supply chains and exacerbate market uncertainty.
